packageRules.description: yt-dlp: monthly cadence is deliberate (weekly canary watches for breakage; nightly only as break-glass — plan pin table)
schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: torch/torchaudio: pinned to the pytorch-cpu index resolution; bump only with an aligner smoke test (ctc-forced-aligner has no torch pin of its own)

ctc-forced-aligner is a git-SHA pin (no releases) — renovate must not touch it. Matched by name AND git slug: the PEP 508 git URL registers under the repo slug, which let PR #1 slip past the name-only rule.
Belt and braces: no git-digest bumps anywhere (only the aligner is pinned that way; a digest bump changes aligner code without a smoke test)
Electron majors gate a manual overlay smoke test on Windows first
